This '''scarred Jawa''' was a member of a [[Jawajawa clan|clan]] who salvaged an [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] and later managed to steal a [[TIE Advanced x1/Legends|TIE advanced]] starfighter from a trio of salvagers on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].

The Jawa had a scar on the right eye, which was similar to that of [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and always carried an [[Jawa ionization blaster/Legends|ion gun]]. Moreover, it had a determined appearance, and would assume the role as leader when the clan went on salvaging expeditions.

==Behind the scenes==
This individual only appears in the story ''[[Oh!! Jawajawa]]'', published in ''[[Star Wars Manga: Silver]]'' issue of [[Tokyopop's Star Wars Manga]]. Originally published in Japan, those stories were considered to be of "fuzzy" continuity by Lucasfilm.<ref>{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=152583&start=980#15895005|thread=Holocron continuity database questions|user=[[Leland Chee|Leland Y Chee]]|date=2006-11-06|time=6:03 PM}}</ref> Since then, they have been republished in English in the United Kingdom under [[Infinities]] label, which established the material in them as [[Canon|non-canonical]].
